Class FileDirectoryTBL

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.jDrive.model.FileDirectoryTBL
@Entity public class FileDirectoryTBL extends Object
JPA Entity representing file directories in the database.

This class maps to the file_directory table and stores directory information for organizing user files. Directories use "/" as a separator and reject inputs containing "/" or "." (home directory indicator) at both frontend and backend.

Key fields:

  • id - Primary key
  • filetableownerid - File owner this directory belongs to
  • userloginid - User who owns this directory
  • uidirectory - UI representation of the directory path
